_comment: Curated English descriptors (8–14 words). Applied after Wikipedia attempt. Keys starting with _ ignored.
copenhagen-hay-restaurant: Danish contemporary furniture and homewares flagship retail store.
copenhagen-byredo-restaurant: Stockholm-founded fragrance house known for perfumes and leather goods.
copenhagen-black-diamond-restaurant: Modern harbor annex of Denmark's Royal Library with exhibitions and reading halls.
copenhagen-opera-house-restaurant: Royal Danish Opera waterfront venue designed by Henning Larsen's studio.
copenhagen-nobis-restaurant: Upscale Copenhagen boutique hotel steps from Tivoli Gardens and transit hubs.
copenhagen-illum-restaurant: Historic Copenhagen department store spanning luxury fashion and Danish design floors.
copenhagen-ferm-living-s-showroom-restau: Danish interiors brand showroom highlighting furniture, lighting, and textiles.
copenhagen-hotel-d-angleterre-restaurant: Grand nineteenth-century Copenhagen hotel facing Kongens Nytorv square.
copenhagen-niels-restaurant: Niels Brock Copenhagen business college campus offering international programmes.
mexico-city-national-palace-attraction: Federal palace on the Zócalo housing Diego Rivera murals and state ceremonies.
paris-le-bristol-spa-wellness: Oetker Collection spa wing inside Le Bristol Paris with pool and fitness studios.
new-york-city-le-crocodile-hotel: Williamsburg brasserie known for lively French-inspired plates and natural wine.
